subpoints: This only allows one speech to take place at a time to fix an issue with incoming notifications during a summary.

text: Network permission has been removed from the Store variant.
subpoints: This remains for the other two variants. GitHub requires the ability to check for and download updates, and the Google Play variant requires internet to use the Google Billing system.

text: Fixed crash when importing settings with pending permissions.
subpoints: This usually occurred when importing settings that require a permission to be granted. Pressing either option would cause the app to crash.

text: Support email picker no longer tries to search for email apps.
subpoints: This caused some problems with deGoogled phones. It now uses a more universal solution.

text: Added “Include Notification Timestamps” to Compatibility Settings.
subpoints: Can help with accuracy if you find the deduplication system is not playing nicely.
